title: NOAA NCEI Continuously Updated Digital Elevation Models and Coastal Relief Models
steward: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

access.reason: The official viewers and catalogs resolve tiles by selected geography and product version; a stable direct object URL must be recorded at download time.
instructions: Select the Bay/coastal California extent in the NOAA NCEI Bathymetric Data Viewer or NOAA Digital Coast CUDEM catalog.
Prefer the highest-resolution current CUDEM tile whose published horizontal and vertical datums cover the study area.
Download GeoTIFF plus source metadata, retain the original filename, and compute SHA-256 during ingestion.
Warp to one projected metre-based CRS before terrain derivation; never relabel a CRS without a true reprojection.
access.ingestion_command: python -m pipeline.contourcast.cli ingest-bathymetry --input RAW.tif --output DATA/bathymetry.npz --source-id noaa_ncei_cudem --vertical-datum PUBLISHED_DATUM --expected-sha256 SHA256

citation: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information. Coastal Elevation Models / Coastal Relief Models. Record product version, DOI when supplied, and access date.
limitations: Horizontal and vertical datums vary by product and vintage and must not be mixed without transformation.
Resolution does not equal positional or vertical accuracy.
Merged DEM cells may derive from surveys collected at different times and densities.
